prompt:
STYLE: 

CAMERA_AND_ANGLE: Medium shot, eye-level camera.

COLOR_AND_LIGHTING: Cinematic rim light, strong backlighting from bright sun rays piercing through thick storm clouds. Soft diffused light on the faces. High contrast between the cool, muted, moody tones of the stormy rain and the warm, ethereal golden light of the sunbeams. Natural balanced color palette — neutral skin tones with healthy warmth, no color cast.

BACKGROUND_AND_ENVIRONMENT: A wild, tall grassy field during a heavy downpour. Dark, dramatic overcast sky above, breaking slightly to reveal divine light rays. Foreground is in sharp focus, with the background slightly softened by atmospheric depth. Heavy, visible rain drops splashing against the subjects, creating a wet, misty, cinematic atmosphere.

FIGURE 1:

Position & Gravity: Standing in the tall grass, leaning backward heavily. Its center of gravity is shifted back, with its weight actively supported by Figure 2.

Head & Expression: Head tilted sharply upward and back. Eyes closed softly, lips parted and actively pressed against the lips of Figure 2 in a deep, passionate kiss. Expression is surrendered and intense.

Anatomical Mapping: Torso arched backward. Left arm raised, with the hand gently resting against the side of Figure 2's neck and jaw. Right arm lowered, wrapped securely around Figure 2's waist. Legs standing in the grass, bearing only partial weight.

Clothing & Gear: A long, sheer, lightweight dress. Completely soaked by the rain, the wet fabric clings tightly to the body, defining the contours beneath and creating delicate, translucent folds.

FIGURE 2:

Position & Gravity: Standing firmly in the grass, leaning forward aggressively over Figure 1. Bearing its own weight completely while physically supporting the backward lean of Figure 1.

Head & Expression: Head tilted downward, leaning in. Eyes closed, lips actively and firmly pressed against the lips of Figure 1 in a deep kiss. Expression is intense and focused.

Anatomical Mapping: Torso leaning forward, shielding Figure 1 slightly from the elements. Left arm raised, hand firmly and protectively cupping the back of Figure 1's head and neck. Right arm tightly wrapped around the lower back of Figure 1, taking its weight. Legs planted firmly apart for balance.

Clothing & Gear: A long-sleeved white button-up shirt and dark trousers. The white shirt is completely soaked by the rain, clinging tightly to the torso, the wet fabric becoming slightly translucent and adhering to the musculature.

INTERACTION: The figures are locked in an intimate, dynamic embrace and a deep kiss, their lips pressed together. Figure 2 physically supports the arched back of Figure 1, creating visible tension in the grip around the waist. Rainwater runs down both figures, blending their silhouettes into the stormy environment.

FORMAT: 4/3

[CRITICAL: The reference images show the EXACT appearance of the characters.]

STYLE: 

NEGATIVE PROMPT:
babyface, child, chibi, round cheeks, oversized eyes, doll-like, plastic skin, glossy finish, high-gloss specular, 3D render, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, hyperrealism, photorealism, heavy airbrushing, perfectly symmetrical face, unnatural flawless skin, modern comic style, harsh neon lighting, deep black shadows, bad anatomy, flat shading, watermark, text, signature.

CAMERA_AND_ANGLE: Close-up shot, slightly high angle, eye-level with the subjects on the bed.

COLOR_AND_LIGHTING: Soft diffused natural light entering from behind and to the left. Bright, warm, airy atmosphere with gentle, soft-edged shadows. Natural balanced color palette — neutral skin tones with healthy warmth, no color cast.

BACKGROUND_AND_ENVIRONMENT: Cozy bedroom interior. Out of focus background with blurred curtains and neutral-toned pillows. Shallow depth of field focusing entirely on the subjects. Relaxed, intimate morning mood.

FIGURE 1:

Position & Gravity: Lying horizontally on its stomach on a soft bed. Upper body slightly propped up, resting its weight heavily on a thick, textured knitted pillow.

Head & Expression: Head resting sideways on the pillow, tilted slightly up. Gaze directed off-camera with a soft, peaceful smile. Eyes slightly narrowed in relaxed contentment.

Anatomical Mapping: Left arm bent, hand gently gripping the edge of the knitted pillow. Right arm tucked beneath the pillow, obscured from view. Torso resting flat against the mattress.

Clothing & Gear: Bare upper back and shoulders exposed. No visible clothing on the upper torso.

FIGURE 2:

Position & Gravity: Leaning over Figure 1 from behind. Lower body weight supported by the bed (unseen), with the upper torso leaning forward and resting gently against Figure 1's back.

Head & Expression: Head lowered, cheek resting near Figure 1's head. Looking directly down at Figure 1's face with a wide, affectionate, genuine smile.

Anatomical Mapping: Torso leaning forward horizontally. Left arm draped down out of frame. Right arm obscured behind Figure 1's body.

Clothing & Gear: Loose, casual short-sleeved t-shirt with natural fabric folds across the shoulders. Hair tied back loosely.

INTERACTION: Figure 2 leans its torso directly against Figure 1's back, transferring slight weight. Their heads are in close proximity. Figure 2's shadow falls softly across Figure 1's bare shoulder. Figure 1's hands are occupied holding the pillow, anchoring the pose.

FORMAT: 2/3

Clothing & Gear: A massive, oversized dark cable-knit sweater with extremely thick, heavy folds that drape over the surface. Tight-fitting horizontal black-and-white striped shorts. Wearing light-colored socks. Holding an open hardcover book with visible pages.
